productDisplayName: Baggit Women Umbrella Dum Brown Handbag
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards, mobile phone and essentials in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish handbag from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this bag anywhere and add style to any casual outfit. Height: 26 cm Width: 46 cm Depth: 12 cm Created from synthetic leather for durability One main zipped compartment with an internal zipped pocket One zipped compartment and a magnetic button compartment on either sides of the main compartment Two short handles woven through synthetic leather loops A zipped pocket at the back for enhanced space Two asymmetric zipped pockets on the front Buckle design on the front for style Brand name printed below the back pocket Bag care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
